overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit alley into a cyberpunk bar and casino interior. The scene features vibrant neon lighting, reflective wet surfaces, and detailed gambling areas with roulette tables, slot machines, and NPC patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit back alley with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow neon-lit alley toward a building entrance

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with asian characters mounted on the left wall
yellow illuminated vending machine with product display
metal corrugated ceiling covering the alleyway
wet reflective asphalt surface with rain puddles reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow covered alley at night. Pink and purple neon signs illuminate the wet asphalt ground, creating colorful reflections. A yellow vending machine stands on the left as the camera moves toward a glass door entrance at the end of the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar with purple neon lighting

events.description: enters indoor bar from covered outdoor alleyway
dialogue interaction with bartender begins, conversation UI appears on screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and engaging in conversation with the bartender

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter serving drinks
patron sitting at the bar with head down on the counter

entered.detail: long dark wooden bar counter with bottles and glassware arranged on top
modern bar stools with glowing purple neon accent lighting
decorative wall panel with circular patterns illuminated by green light

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit cyberpunk bar from the alley, transitioning from wet asphalt to carpeted flooring. The bar features purple neon lighting, a long counter with glowing stools, and a decorative patterned wall. The player character approaches the bartender and initiates a dialogue interaction while a patron sits slumped at the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: casino floor with roulette tables and neon advertisements

events.description: moves from bar area into main casino gaming floor with multiple roulette tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the casino floor observing the gambling tables and other patrons

notable_agents.action: dealer in vest operating the roulette table
gambler placing chips on the roulette betting layout

entered.detail: green felt roulette table with numbered betting grid and wooden trim
red and wood trimmed roulette table with spinning wheel
large glowing digital advertisement screens displaying product holograms

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bar area, the scene opens into a spacious casino floor filled with roulette tables and glowing neon advertisements. The camera moves past a green felt roulette table where a dealer and gambler are engaged in play, then approaches a red-trimmed table. The environment is filled with holographic screens and scattered patrons seated at various gaming stations.

scene_state.functional_zone: casino corner area with red ambient lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to deeper red and orange tones in the back corner area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the casino toward a quieter corner with red lighting and additional gaming tables

notable_agents.action: female dealer in white uniform standing at the wooden gaming table

entered.detail: curved wooden gaming table with blue felt surface and roulette wheel
corner area illuminated with red neon strip lighting along the walls
upholstered bench seating in the corner with purple lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the casino, passing into a corner area with distinct red ambient lighting. A curved wooden gaming table with a female dealer becomes the focal point, while the previous roulette tables fall behind. The segment ends as the camera approaches a seating booth in the red-lit corner, with glass partitions and wall decorations visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked neon alley into the opulent, glowing interior of a cyberpunk casino. It begins by moving through a narrow covered passage where pink and purple neon signs reflect off wet asphalt, passing a yellow vending machine toward a glass entrance. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts from the damp outdoors to a dimly lit bar with carpeted floors and purple lighting, where the camera pauses to interact with a bartender. The scene then opens into a spacious casino floor filled with holographic screens and green felt roulette tables, moving past dealers and gamblers under vibrant advertisements. Finally, the camera glides deeper into the venue, transitioning into a corner bathed in red ambient light before settling near a curved wooden gaming table and a private seating booth.
